title: A Plumber Found Her Lost Engagement Ring. It Had Been in a Pipe for 10 Years.
script: 10 years inside a pipe! Carol Oram lost her engagement ring 10 years ago when a customer dropped it down a toilet at a shopping plaza in Hartland, Michigan — and it slipped into the drain before anyone could retrieve it. She gave up hope. Last week, plumbers from Titan Plumbing in Howell showed up for a routine sewer job at the same plaza. Inside the pipe, they spotted something shiny. They posted about it online. Carol's coworker Sue recognized the description and connected the dots. Carol and her husband — married 60 years — drove down to claim the ring. She cried. The plumbers had it professionally cleaned first, because 10 years in a sewer pipe does things to jewelry. What are the odds that ring survived 10 years in Hartland's plumbing?
